name: Tina Smith
subject: Tomorrow is our first debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
It would mean so much to me to see your name on this.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a5e6/c1f7015/6a8c94fe/11419315/3316160093/VEsH/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1808_first-debate?source=rtw_20180806_em") Friend, Tomorrow, I'm taking the stage for our first debate. This is one of our largest platforms to share with voters what we stand for before our primary election August 14th. Next to all our opponents, I will share that as progressives we must forcefully declare that we are pro-choice, believe in climate change, fighting for a living wage, for common sense gun measures to save lives, ready to fight against Trump's attacks on immigrant families, for equality everywhere, and against Supreme Court Justices that would rule against these values. **These are core values to our campaign -- and to me. And they are why I 'm in this race.** [**I 'm ready to defend our values at the debate tomorrow, but I need to know you're in this fight with me. Will you add your name here and say you're on this team? It would mean so much to me to see your name on this. **](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a5e6/c1f7015/6a8c94fe/11419315/3316160093/VEsE/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1808_first-debate?source=rtw_20180806_em") I know this campaign is nothing without the grassroots activists like you who are working so hard right now knocking doors, making phone calls, giving what they can, and talking to your neighbors about what's at stake. This campaign is truly people-powered. And I couldn't be more proud of that. Thank you, Tina **[Stand with Tina](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a5e6/c1f7015/6a8c94fe/11419315/3316160093/VEsF/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_1808_first-debate?source=rtw_20180806_em")**

subject: Sign VoteVets petition: "Congress, do not appropriate funds for a military parade down Pennsylvania Avenue on Veterans Day."
body:
Activist -

It seems that with each day we are getting closer and closer to military parade down Pennsylvania Avenue on Veterans Day.

Make no mistake about it, this parade would be far from the national celebration he claims. It would be an international embarrassment.

Think this is about saluting the military? No way. It's about the military saluting a man who sought multiple deferments when his nation called him to serve.

There's only one way to stop this now -- and that is Congress refusing to appropriate funds for this banana republic-like demonstration. And in this debate, it's important for all of us -- especially veterans, military families, and those who support them -- to make their voices heard.

[**Sign VoteVets petition: "Congress, do not appropriate funds for a military parade down Pennsylvania Avenue on Veterans Day. The troops don't want it and our country doesn't need it. Don't let the Trump embarrass our military to stroke his ego."**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/SBC7a/6/GT/r5cs/619vOB/6NjvjON2vY/P/P)

Think about this: Trump's parade will cost up to $30 million or more. His most recent budget cut food assistance for more than 23,000 service members. What's the cost of providing food assistance to 23,000 service members? Just about $30 million.

Want to support those who served, Trump? Use the money for that.

All our best,

The team at VoteVets

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: Let's hold them accountable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/x_4HB8FTg4pUrU8P8B2vl80bluMbuR4bB0Wm3Y3uzyQ=/yRzznrWuVn10dRTg45OgFETJFQK1S43uuBpedvyqRF0=) Friends and Neighbors -- During my years in the tech sector, the early days of building Yahoo!, I quickly recognized that some people simply were not afforded the tools they needed to build their social skills - and still others weren't given the resources they needed to navigate around their particular barriers. **That is why, as a Senator, I focused heavily on safe schools, efforts to curb bullying and school violence and the full inclusion of students with disabilities. ** So imagine my surprise when, after the Students of Parkland were devastated by a young man with known and diagnosed with mental health issues, I revisited the status of two responsibilities of the Florida Department of Education, **only to find out that the agency has ignored both state and federal law. ** To date,the Florida Department of Education has not complied with federal law, requiring states to expand services to students with disabilities (like the Parkland shooter). And last October, the agency returned 18 million dollars to the federal government - funding that was meant to identify and support students with disabilities including mental health disabilities that may cause a student to hurt themselves or others. As this is federal money, it doesn't go before the State Legislature like state general revenue funds do. Only Florida Department of Federal Services (DFS) and the Governor could have provided a firewall. This begs the question -**why did the State 's Chief Financial Officer - the sole firewall between taxpayers and government waste, fraud and abuse - not question the Florida Department of Education?** [Let's Hold Them Accountable. Contribute $20.18](https://act.myngp.com/el/x_4HB8FTg4pUrU8P8B2vl80bluMbuR4bB0Wm3Y3uzyQ=/15OGXr7OMft5TsRe0qDA_n8E0stYXySsCpJod1YIzPQ=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) My fellow Floridians, we need accountability - these are not simply facts and figures within a budget. **They have potentially, literally life and death consequences.** When I am your CFO - as I did in the State Legislature, when I introduced key legislation on the subject - I will hold all agencies accountable for properly implementing and complying with all federal and state laws. And I'll be damn sure to call them out publicly before I sign [**an 18 million dollar check - of your hard earned money - back to the federal government.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/x_4HB8FTg4pUrU8P8B2vl80bluMbuR4bB0Wm3Y3uzyQ=/8WkdIqjQC4OvPhx23r69npr_TZV2hkxmAuOyNZ__XIQ=) But I have an election to win first. **And I can 't do it without your help.** [**Can you contribute $20.18 or more today, to help prevent future tragedies like the one in Parkland by developing and funding programs that can help to identify and curb their causes?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/x_4HB8FTg4pUrU8P8B2vl80bluMbuR4bB0Wm3Y3uzyQ=/15OGXr7OMft5TsRe0qDA_n8E0stYXySsCpJod1YIzPQ=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for everything you do, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
---

Only Florida Department of Federal Services (DFS) and the Governor could have provided a firewall. This begs the question -why did the State 's Chief Financial Officer - the sole firewall between taxpayers and government waste, fraud and abuse - not question the Florida Department of Education? & My fellow Floridians, we need accountability - these are not simply facts and figures within a budget. They have potentially, literally life and death consequences. When I am your CFO - as I did in the State Legislature, when I introduced key legislation on the subject - I will hold all agencies accountable for properly implementing and complying with all federal and state laws. And I'll be damn sure to call them out publicly before I sign = But I have an election to win first. And I can 't do it without your help. & Thank you for everything you do, Jeremy Ring | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER Jeremy Ring for Florida Chief Financial Officer PO Box 670311 Coral Springs FL 33067 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =. .

The White House • August 7, 2018
# The Trump boom even the media can’t ignore
**Last week’s jobs report** has shined a light on the incredible gains American workers are seeing in the Trump Economy. The media, both liberal and conservative, can’t ignore the story of this remarkable turnaround: **•** THE NEW YORK TIMES: Workers Hardest Hit by Recession Are Joining in Recovery **•** FOX BUSINESS: Millions Drop Off Food Stamps **•** THE HILL: Employment Data Hasn’t Been This Good Since the Days of the iPod **•** CHICAGO TRIBUNE: This Is What a Booming Economy Feels Like **Unemployment dipped to 3.9 percent last week** —just the eighth time since 1970 it has fallen below 4 percent. (And nearly half of those occasions happened in 2018.) **Most important is who is benefitting.** President Donald J. Trump promised to look out for Americans from every corner of the country, not the well-connected and powerful. He’s delivered. “The least educated American workers, who took the hardest hit in the Great Recession . . . are a striking symbol of a strong economy,” _The New York Times_ reports. **[The Trump Economy, in the media’s words](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODA3LjkzNDEzODcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwNy45MzQxMzg3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY2MjYzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/booming-economy-lifting-american-workers/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)** **More:** [**President Trump is getting the economy critics said wasn’t possible.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODA3LjkzNDEzODcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwNy45MzQxMzg3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY2MjYzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-economic-agenda-delivering-gdp-growth-dismissed-unrealistic/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
# First Lady Melania Trump: ‘My passion’
**First Lady Melania Trump continues to advance her ‘Be Best’ initiative** , an awareness campaign dedicated to protecting children. **Two weeks ago** , she [**visited patients**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODA3LjkzNDEzODcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwNy45MzQxMzg3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY2MjYzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.apnews.com/ecc8f069c4784ccda9066c3d41f57561) at an intensive care unit in Nashville, Tennessee. “My passion is to shine a light on the opioid crisis,” the First Lady said. “I want to continue to learn and believe in starting early to educate young mothers and children about the dangers of drugs.” **Be Best focuses** on some of the major issues facing children today, while also teaching them the importance of social, emotional, and physical health. The initiative concentrates on three main pillars: well-being, social media use, and opioid abuse. **“I believe the more we talk** about this, the shame and guilt will go away,” the First Lady said about the dangers of drug use. [**Learn more about the First Lady’s Be Best initiative.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODA3LjkzNDEzODcxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgwNy45MzQxMzg3MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzY2MjYzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/bebest/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)

name: Adam Spanberger
subject: Today is Abby’s birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
The last time I sent one of these emails, my wife was just four weeks into her campaign for Congress. Back then, there were just a handful of us on Team Spanberger, operating from our dining room, planning our strategy for a primary well off in the distance.
| | Dear Peter, The last time I sent one of these emails, my wife was just four weeks into her campaign for Congress. Back then, there were just a handful of us on Team Spanberger, operating from our dining room, planning our strategy for a primary well off in the distance. Despite being outspent, she won her primary with nearly 73% of the vote. She did it with hard work and tenacity and by encouraging people to stand up and fight to move this country forward. As a result, we've grown our team to over 2,000 volunteers, set new Democratic fundraising records for this district, and turned a safe Republican seat into a toss-up race. Quite a birthday gift for our candidate! But while this campaign looks nothing like what it did a year ago, Abby hasn't changed one bit. She's a year older -- and sure, a lot wiser -- but she's still the same fun, caring, hilarious, and hardworking woman she's always been. The only real difference now is that more people know about her! Last year on her birthday, I shared a personal story about the kind of person she is, and over 50 people generously donated to a virtually unknown candidate, which helped her build the most competitive Democratic campaign this district has ever seen. [**This year, our goal is 200 donations. Can you tell her "Happy Birthday" with a contribution of your own today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oIhVIwdU60ein6skaukRmyYBhxQPVAWi7wvg1FpGy_0=/ZrDvqQDFYQzWQKsY5L1qg9g3ksvks_1gymQgNlARoEE=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.07_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) If we hit that goal, it'll be a promising sign that she will win in November. [**Help us hit 200 donations today**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oIhVIwdU60ein6skaukRmyYBhxQPVAWi7wvg1FpGy_0=/ZrDvqQDFYQzWQKsY5L1qg9g3ksvks_1gymQgNlARoEE=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.07_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) so we can replace an ideologically-driven Tea Party legislator with a fact-based, problem-solving, hardworking woman. Every bit truly helps. Thank you for your support, Peter, and I hope the next one of these I send out is for her re-election campaign! Sincerely, Adam P.S. For a walk down memory lane, I included last year's email below. \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Adam Spanberger <adam@abigailspanberger.com> Date: Mon, Aug 7, 2017 at 8:45 AM Subject: It's Abby's Birthday Hello, Today marks four weeks of my wife's campaign, and it's also her birthday! She's gotten a lot of great press, and so many of you have already made generous donations. Thank you! Abby's resume speaks for itself, so I thought I'd use her birthday as an opportunity to share a story about her true character. While living in Europe with Abby's CIA job, we visited Paris one weekend. We were walking down the street doing touristy things, when Abby noticed a woman collapse on the sidewalk about 50 yards away. Abby ran to her aid, consoled the woman, and directed others to call for an ambulance. This took place in a foreign language in a foreign country. She stayed by her side until the paramedics took over. Abby has always been someone to help others whenever needed. During this campaign, however, she needs your help. At this point in the campaign, she needs financial contributions. The number of donors and total amount raised in the first 3 months demonstrates Abby's strength as a candidate. It also allows us to budget how many signs, stickers, and TV ads, we can buy next year. Tonight, when we celebrate with family, I'd love to tell Abby that 50 people chipped in to wish her a happy birthday. [**Please make a birthday contribution today!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oIhVIwdU60ein6skaukRmyYBhxQPVAWi7wvg1FpGy_0=/ZrDvqQDFYQzWQKsY5L1qg9g3ksvks_1gymQgNlARoEE=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.07_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thank you, Adam [](https://act.myngp.com/el/oIhVIwdU60ein6skaukRmyYBhxQPVAWi7wvg1FpGy_0=/ZrDvqQDFYQzWQKsY5L1qg9g3ksvks_1gymQgNlARoEE=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.07_b1_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)

subject: Upset brewing in Ohio's 13th Congressional District?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris DePizzo for Congress
body:
Clout Research recently completed a survey of 581 likely voters in Ohio’s 13th Congressional... | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
> _Clout Research recently completed a survey of 581 likely voters in Ohio’s 13th Congressional District. The survey was conducted June 23‐27, 2018 and has a margin of error of ±4.06%. The memorandum below reviews the key findings of the poll. The survey was sponsored by Chris DePizzo for Congress._
>
> **1\. President Trump is more popular than Nancy Pelosi in the 13 th District.**
> President Trump’s 47% approval rating in the 13th District is higher than his approval nationally according to the latest _RealClearPolitics_ average of 43%. Only 38% of voters have a favorable view of Nancy Pelosi. Among Independent voters, Nancy Pelosi’s image is significantly underwater, with only 22% viewing her favorably and almost 70% unfavorably, a net of about -47. President Trump fares almost 30 points better among self-described Independents.
>
> **2\. Blue-Collar voters abandon Tim Ryan for Republican Chris DePizzo.**
> Even as an unknown opponent, blue-collar voters prefer Chris DePizzo over Tim Ryan, 56% to 36%. Once blue-collar voters learn more about DePizzo, his lead over Ryan balloons to +25%.
>
> **3\. Once union voters learn more about DePizzo, they prefer him over Ryan.**
> After learning more about both candidates, union voters (public, trade and service) prefer DePizzo to Ryan 47% to 36%. DePizzo’s story as a first generation college graduate who has helped create jobs and wants to deliver an aggressive new leadership to the 13th District resonates with union voters who hand him an 11-point lead on the ballot.
>
> **4\. Once they learn more, middle class voters prefer DePizzo over Ryan.**
> Although Ryan is much better known in the district, having 81% name identification compared to DePizzo’s 23%, Ryan only leads DePizzo 51% to 44% among middle class voters. After these voters learn more about DePizzo, they prefer him to Ryan 49% to 45%, a net +11 point move toward DePizzo on the ballot.
>
> **5\. Ryan’s approval is weak. Once better known, DePizzo’s approval is strong.**
> Never having faced a competitive election before, Ryan’s approval in the District has significantly weakened, with only 51% of voters having a favorable view of Ryan. Amazingly, even members of the Democratic Party only give Ryan a 60% favorable rating. Those voters who learn just a little more about DePizzo, give him a 62% approval rating.
>

Hey Peter,

Dan has been busy up on the Hill, so we wanted to give you a quick update and a chance to voice your opinion. Just this month, Dan's bipartisan bill to expand veterans' benefits passed the House and Senate, and is now awaiting the president's signature.

A report from the Department of Defense even shows that expanding access to these services would not only improve the quality of life for veterans, but would also strengthen the commissary and exchange system.

name: Mark Osmack
subject: Voting is patriotic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Osmack for Missouri
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/sKdh3CzpjohkRbC7aCfiFMbuFHLA5EmaOP2zqzmRVeQ=/XhzeHVFhm5NbM40ForESnGWUPDwEkxn-J0S_ImF42ao=)

Friends,

We've been getting a lot of positive feedback from our friends, supporters, and neighbors about the turnout so far for our campaign today. Voters are saying they heard about us from a friend or relative; noticed that we sought common ground with those who disagree with us, approaching them not as enemies but as fellow Americans; and appreciated our bold, consistent message about the big issues like fixing healthcare with a Medicare for All system.

I am often thanked for my service in the Army--but the truth is, we are all called to a higher duty. Exercising our right to vote is one of those duties. It is a way in which every citizen can give back to their country, and make sure the progress of this nation reflects their highest ideals.

So if you haven't yet, I encourage you to get out and vote. Voting is patriotic. It is good for our republic. And it is an effective way to change the direction of our country.

[Find your polling place here.](https://act.myngp.com/el/sKdh3CzpjohkRbC7aCfiFMbuFHLA5EmaOP2zqzmRVeQ=/YBqAwEhBrGt3xnacxATE8k9gdY67sST7iAieXirSMoM=)

I hope I have been able to earn your vote on this important day. >From the bottom of my heart, thank you.

Respectfully,

-Mark

name: David Ortiz
subject: Make a difference this fall
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Gina Raimondo
body:
Hi friend,
These next few months will provide some of the best opportunities for political activism Rhode Island has ever seen - and we're looking for a few more folks to take the lead and join our team.
**Are you or someone you know ready to make a difference?[Click here to learn more!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0eb/5e076a9e/540d3795/144264d5/2759698501/VEsH/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/s/fall-fellow-program")**
**Over the last four years, we have made tremendous progress. But all this progress is at risk.** Governor Gina Raimondo's opponents are threatening to undo all the work we have done. Under her leadership, we have gone from the worst unemployment in the nation, to more Rhode Islanders working than at any time in the last decade. She is leading the effort to ensure every Rhode Islander has access to the education and training they need to keep up and get ahead in today's economy.
**In order to cement Rhode Island 's comeback, we need your help.** Our Fall Fellows will get hands-on experience in volunteer recruitment, training to running local strategy sessions and organizing an efficient operation!
**Are you ready to help with Governor Raimondo 's re-election? [Click here to apply now](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0eb/5e076a9e/540d3795/144264d5/2759698501/VEsE/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/s/fall-fellow-program"), and pass along this information to anyone else who might be interested!**
Thank you,
David Ortiz
Deputy Campaign Manager

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Will you give me a moment to explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
We could not do this without you.
#

Peter -
In a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign for Attorney General, but first I want to explain why your donation -- especially today -- is so important.
I'll be blunt: Our campaign is the only true grassroots campaign in this race. We're facing the political and financial establishment's hand-picked candidates, and they're relying on corporate money and big donors. We're not. We're rejecting corporate money because you cannot be independent when you take money from a corrupt system.
And this is why your donation matters so much:
The overwhelming majority of our donations come from supporters like you giving in response to emails like this one. We're very proud of this.
So to show everyone what a grassroots campaign looks like, we've set a big goal for this deadline. We are trying to generate as many donations _this week_ as all of our opponents had combined after the last deadline. So here's where I ask:
**[Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign right now before our critical deadline on Thursday? Every donation matters. This isn't just about how much we raise, but how many people are chipping in to make this possible.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780efa/6e822e2f/1a4f8f78/4172406c/384941609/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MDctMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-august-deadline?refcode=em180807-1-full")**
The grassroots support for our campaign means the world to me. It's this support that will ensure I can be a totally independent Attorney General.
So thank you for being a part of this. The only way we will win is if we're in this together.
Best,
Zephyr
**[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780efa/6e822e2f/1a4f8f78/4172406c/384941609/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MDctMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-august-deadline?refcode=em180807-1-full")**

* * *

Democrats have a very narrow path to Senate control in November, so we can't afford a _single_ Democratic loss - and that includes my friend Sen. Chris Murphy.

**CNN calls Chris "unapologetic," and his record shows just that: He's stood up to the Trump-GOP agenda on everything from gun control to women's rights and health care. **
But Chris' team just told me that while he's been fighting for us in the Senate, they've fallen behind on their fundraising goals. So I'm reaching out to this grassroots team that helped power me to victory to see if we can raise $10,000 for Chris by midnight tonight.
**Friends, Chris is counting on us so he can keep fighting for our shared values and help Democrats take back the Senate in November, but right now, we're falling short of our goal, so I'm counting on you to step up.[Will you give just $5 today to reelect Chris Murphy and help Democrats take back the Senate in November?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cjs4csm?refcode=jtk869-bu-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**

| | | Friends - Last night, Stacey went on _The Daily Show with Trevor Noah_ to talk about her bold strategy to win this campaign: **Hear for yourself! Watch the interview:** [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa972/34a064cc/aa0bc2d/70e9361/1831671621/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODA3MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-dailyshow?refcode=IE080718-full") Stacey's parents were activists during the civil rights movement, and they raised her and her siblings to revere the right to vote. That's a message Stacey carries with her as she crisscrosses the state in this campaign. It's also exactly how we're going to win -- by talking to every single Georgian, _especially_ in communities that have largely been ignored by politicians, and those who are the least likely to be asked to vote. We're talking to those voters because we know their vote matters -- because they have a _stake_ in the decision-making process. Pundits ask us all the time how we plan to make headway in a traditionally red state in the Deep South. It's simple: **We are going to give people a reason to use their right to vote. That 's our strategy. And it's how we're going to win.** **[Watch Stacey's appearance on _The Daily Show with Trevor Noah_ here.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa972/34a064cc/aa0bc2d/70e9361/1831671621/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODA3MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-dailyshow?refcode=IE080718-full")** -- Team Abrams

name: Adam Spanberger
subject: FW: Today is Abby’s birthday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
The day isn't even over, but we've already seen an amazing outpouring of support from this community of supporters.
| | Peter, Just a few hours ago, I asked you to help me wish Abby a happy birthday with a donation to her campaign for Congress. Our goal was ambitious -- 200 donations for her big day. The day isn't over, but we've already seen a huge outpouring of support. _108 of you and counting_ have already contributed today -- an incredible show of support for Abby and her campaign to bring accessible, accountable leadership to Virginia's 7th district. **[Peter, if you haven't had the chance already, can you help us reach our goal with a donation in honor of Abby's birthday?](https://act.myngp.com/el/s2tVN5TMGKf0EswTGLZZl24VQ_UvzBrzpTA2r7WjzmE=/suBsKncmZSxT2ByPT7DtCTyHnCFrhFwKPIvlpbxs0wQ=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.07_b2_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)** Thank you for supporting Abby, today and over the past year -- it means so much to this campaign and to both of us. Adam \----- Forwarded message ----- From: Adam Spanberger <adam@abigailspanberger.com> Date: Tue, Aug 7, 2018 at 11:28 AM Subject: Today is Abby's birthday! Dear friend, The last time I sent one of these emails, my wife was just four weeks into her campaign for Congress. Back then, there were just a handful of us on Team Spanberger, operating from our dining room, planning our strategy for a primary well off in the distance. Despite being outspent, she won her primary with nearly 73% of the vote. She did it with hard work and tenacity and by encouraging people to stand up and fight to move this country forward. As a result, we've grown our team to over 2,000 volunteers, set new Democratic fundraising records for this district, and turned a safe Republican seat into a toss-up race. Quite a birthday gift for our candidate! But while this campaign looks nothing like what it did a year ago, Abby hasn't changed one bit. She's a year older -- and sure, a lot wiser -- but she's still the same fun, caring, hilarious, and hardworking woman she's always been. The only real difference now is that more people know about her! Last year on her birthday, I shared a personal story about the kind of person she is, and over 50 people generously donated to a virtually unknown candidate, which helped her build the most competitive Democratic campaign this district has ever seen. [**This year, our goal is 200 donations. Can you tell her "Happy Birthday" with a contribution of your own today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/s2tVN5TMGKf0EswTGLZZl24VQ_UvzBrzpTA2r7WjzmE=/suBsKncmZSxT2ByPT7DtCTyHnCFrhFwKPIvlpbxs0wQ=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.07_b2_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) If we hit that goal, it'll be a promising sign that she will win in November. [**Help us hit 200 donations today**](https://act.myngp.com/el/s2tVN5TMGKf0EswTGLZZl24VQ_UvzBrzpTA2r7WjzmE=/suBsKncmZSxT2ByPT7DtCTyHnCFrhFwKPIvlpbxs0wQ=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.07_b2_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) so we can replace an ideologically-driven Tea Party legislator with a fact-based, problem-solving, hardworking woman. Every bit truly helps. Thank you for your support, friend, and I hope the next one of these I send out is for her re-election campaign! Sincerely, Adam P.S. For a walk down memory lane, I included last year's email below. \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Adam Spanberger <adam@abigailspanberger.com> Date: Mon, Aug 7, 2017 at 8:45 AM Subject: It's Abby's Birthday Hello, Today marks four weeks of my wife's campaign, and it's also her birthday! She's gotten a lot of great press, and so many of you have already made generous donations. Thank you! Abby's resume speaks for itself, so I thought I'd use her birthday as an opportunity to share a story about her true character. While living in Europe with Abby's CIA job, we visited Paris one weekend. We were walking down the street doing touristy things, when Abby noticed a woman collapse on the sidewalk about 50 yards away. Abby ran to her aid, consoled the woman, and directed others to call for an ambulance. This took place in a foreign language in a foreign country. She stayed by her side until the paramedics took over. Abby has always been someone to help others whenever needed. During this campaign, however, she needs your help. At this point in the campaign, she needs financial contributions. The number of donors and total amount raised in the first 3 months demonstrates Abby's strength as a candidate. It also allows us to budget how many signs, stickers, and TV ads, we can buy next year. Tonight, when we celebrate with family, I'd love to tell Abby that 50 people chipped in to wish her a happy birthday. [**Please make a birthday contribution today!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/s2tVN5TMGKf0EswTGLZZl24VQ_UvzBrzpTA2r7WjzmE=/suBsKncmZSxT2ByPT7DtCTyHnCFrhFwKPIvlpbxs0wQ=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.07_b2_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thank you, Adam [](https://act.myngp.com/el/s2tVN5TMGKf0EswTGLZZl24VQ_UvzBrzpTA2r7WjzmE=/suBsKncmZSxT2ByPT7DtCTyHnCFrhFwKPIvlpbxs0wQ=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.07_b2_as_all&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
---

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/s2tVN5TMGKf0EswTGLZZl24VQ_UvzBrzpTA2r7WjzmE=/4G9gHpWD3N0K4Pp1QtqbZyW564XcaV6mRopt4neJkT8=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/s2tVN5TMGKf0EswTGLZZl24VQ_UvzBrzpTA2r7WjzmE=/yMD7lhpK9PQe5rLP36217IFKOWSV5TtBhBRFB3cX8jk=)_

At this point in the campaign, she needs financial contributions. The number of donors and total amount raised in the first 3 months demonstrates Abby's strength as a candidate. It also allows us to budget how many signs, stickers, and TV ads, we can buy next year. Tonight, when we celebrate with family, I'd love to tell Abby that 50 people chipped in to wish her a happy birthday. Thank you, Adam = Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. name: Tim Kaine
subject: No hate in our state - sign the digital pledge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, I'm asking you to take a stand.

Every state in this nation has seen the ugliness that division and hate have caused in our history, and continue to cause today.

**Here in Virginia, we saw that division and hate on horrifying display on[August 12th of last year,](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12fb/3e0906/6f9cbf90/3e3505d1/3385084725/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180807_1_PET_TK_Pledge-TK-NS-T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+August+12th+of+last+year&utm_campaign=20180807_1_PET_TK_Pledge-TK-NS-T2") when a white supremacy rally descended on Charlottesville. **

As we come up on the one-year anniversary of that horrible day when three people lost their lives - Heather Heyer, a paralegal, Lieutenant H. Jay Cullen, and Trooper Berke M.M. Bates - I think it's important that everybody in Virginia bands together to send a message: ["No Hate in Our State."](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12fb/3e0906/6f9cbf90/3e3505d0/3385084725/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180807_1_PET_TK_Pledge-TK-NS-T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+ldquoNo+Hate+in+Our+Staterdquo&utm_campaign=20180807_1_PET_TK_Pledge-TK-NS-T2") | [**PLEDGE: No Hate in Our State**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f12fb/3e0906/6f9cbf90/3e3505d7/3385084725/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180807_1_PET_TK_Pledge-TK-NS-T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+PLEDGE+No+Hate+in+Our+State&utm_campaign=20180807_1_PET_TK_Pledge-TK-NS-T2")

Hate is not a Virginia value.

---
| There’s been a lot of talk about what was accomplished this past legislative session, including:
* $71 million in property tax rate relief;
* Eliminating the tax on Social Security for low and middle-income Vermonters;
* Lowering income tax rates across the board for all filers;
* And much more!

But what you haven't heard as much about were the various pieces of harmful legislation that could have passed -- from a new carbon tax to a new payroll tax -- but didn’t, thanks to Governor Scott’s efforts and the solid backing of legislative Republicans. **Here are just some of the taxes and fees Governor Scott and Republican lawmakers were able to prevent:**
* New carbon tax;
* New payroll tax on Vermonters’ wages;
* Income tax surcharge;
* Increase in the meals and rooms tax;
* Occupancy fee;
* Per-parcel fee;
* Small business surcharge;
* Sugar tax;
* Bag tax;
* And many, many more!

Thanks to Governor Scott’s vetoes and a united Republican Caucus, we avoided many new taxes and fees. They displayed fiscal responsibility and showed a real commitment to affordability. **Primary Day is next Tuesday, and we need your support! Please vote in the Republican Primary on Tuesday, August 14th for Governor Phil Scott so he can continue to fight for our wallets!** Sincerely, Team Scott

**First-time Candidate J.D. Scholten Defeats Notorious Eight-term Incumbent Steve King**
Imagine waking up and reading the potential headline above.
Three months from now—November 7th—we’ll all wake up to reports of who won the midterm elections. **If we defeat Steve King, it will be THE biggest story in the country!**
Every day, we move a little closer to achieving that goal. Whether or not we can beat Steve King depends a great deal on the people who are reading this email right now.
As I’ve often said on the campaign trail, “**I** can’t beat Steve King—but **WE** can!”
To bring this victory home, I’m going to need your help. And there are so many ways you can get involved in this fight to #dethronetheKing. Here are just a few:
**VOLUNTEER:** This one is the most important. You can knock on doors, make calls from anywhere in the country using our virtual phone bank, enter data at one of our offices, or bring food to our hungry volunteers. There is so much work to do and we need all the help we can get to build our people-powered army. To volunteer, simply reply to this email [**_HERE_**](mailto:scott@scholten4iowa.com?subject=I'm%20interested%20in%20volunteering%20with%20Scholten4Iowa!) with your name and phone number or email address and someone from our field team will follow up with you. You can also host an event or fundraising house party in the district by replying [**_HERE_**](mailto:david@scholten4iowa.com?subject=I'm%20interested%20in%20hosting%20a%20house%20party%20fundraiser.).
**SPREAD THE WORD:** This can be done in so many ways. If you’re in the district, talking to your friends and neighbors is one of the most valuable things you can do. Let them know about why you’re supporting our campaign, how important this election is, and how much their vote matters. Another way to do that is by getting a yard sign or a t-shirt and showing your support for the campaign. Today, the New Hampshire affiliate of the American Federation of Teachers formally endorsed this campaign because of my deeply rooted commitment to public education and New Hampshire's children. Every child in our state deserves a quality education.
But Chris Sununu's school voucher plan would siphon money from public schools and funnel our tax dollars into private, religious schools.
We need your help. If reelected, Chris Sununu says his top priority will be school vouchers, which would weaken public schools and raise your property taxes. That's wrong.
****[Chip in $5- or whatever you can spare now - to stop Chris Sununu and ensure we have a public education system where all children can learn and thrive. ](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc48e6/d0ce7de/51189e4f/9cd3510/258003215/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrOTEtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk91-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Take note -- it's time to vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Vote today in the Washington primary election to demand progress!

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78505/2f5ea88d/76d8d382/2cbc364f/3015338475/VEsH/ "https://weiapplets.sos.wa.gov/MyVote/#/login") Friend, I'm sure you've all heard what President Trump has to say about climate change. "It's a myth." "A con job." "A scam created by the Chinese." Any excuse he can come up with to not actually deal with the problem. Yes, that would be a lot easier. We too could sit back and blame other countries as sea levels rise and wildfires spread. We too could put the blame on someone else while our children's health risks increase from polluted air. Maybe someone else will do something about it. President Trump has already realized this is the easy way out. **But we are not looking for the easy way out.** There is something that each of us can do. **And it is so simple.** The Washington primary election is today. If we can get enough people to show up and vote, we can kick off this election cycle by showing that climate change matters to Washington state. Our state is leading the country on so many issues -- the rest of the nation is influenced by what we do. [**It's critical that we keep up the progress by electing those who share our values. And the first step to that is voting in this primary election. You can find your voting information, including a list of drop box locations, by signing into the Secretary of State's MyVote page.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78505/2f5ea88d/76d8d382/2cbc364f/3015338475/VEsE/ "https://weiapplets.sos.wa.gov/MyVote/#/login") **The stakes for this election could not be higher.** The issue of climate change is slowly slipping off the table. The Trump administration has pulled out of the Paris climate change agreement, and, just last week, Trump moved to roll back Obama-era emission standards that aim to prevent global warming. Flipping the House would be the difference between two more years of unrestrained climate-denial, and two years of a Democratic Congress with the power to stop polluter-friendly laws. Washington's 8th, 3rd, and 5th districts are key to winning back the House -- voters must turn out. With a slim one-seat majority in the Senate at the state level, addressing climate change could easily slip off Washington's agenda too. Last November, voters like you gave us a Democratic majority in all three branches of our state government, building a big blue wall against the Trump agenda. We were able to lead the nation in passing progressive legislation. But Republicans are fighting to get a majority back and stop our progress. We cannot stop climate change by pretending it doesn't exist. But we can make a difference by electing leaders who understand the risks and will put measures in place to ensure a clean future. **If you want to put climate change back on the table, and show the country that Washington can lead, I strongly encourage you to vote at the primary elections today.** Remember that your ballot must be postmarked by today (postage is on us!), returned to a designated ballot drop box by 8:00 p.m., or returned in person to your county elections department by 8:00 p.m. tonight. [**You can find more information on the MyVote page**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78505/2f5ea88d/76d8d382/2cbc364f/3015338475/VEsF/ "https://weiapplets.sos.wa.gov/MyVote/#/login") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee P.S. Did you know that Washington now pays for the stamp on your ballot? If you're voting by mail this year, don't worry about the postage! Just fill out your ballot and put it in a mailbox.

clean_body: Vote today in the Washington primary election to demand progress! | "" Friend, I'm sure you've all heard what President Trump has to say about climate change. "It's a myth." "A con job." "A scam created by the Chinese." Any excuse he can come up with to not actually deal with the problem. Yes, that would be a lot easier. We too could sit back and blame other countries as sea levels rise and wildfires spread. We too could put the blame on someone else while our children's health risks increase from polluted air. Maybe someone else will do something about it. President Trump has already realized this is the easy way out. But we are not looking for the easy way out. There is something that each of us can do. And it is so simple. The Washington primary election is today. If we can get enough people to show up and vote, we can kick off this election cycle by showing that climate change matters to Washington state. Our state is leading the country on so many issues -- the rest of the nation is influenced by what we do. "" The stakes for this election could not be higher. The issue of climate change is slowly slipping off the table. The Trump administration has pulled out of the Paris climate change agreement, and, just last week, Trump moved to roll back Obama-era emission standards that aim to prevent global warming. Flipping the House would be the difference between two more years of unrestrained climate-denial, and two years of a Democratic Congress with the power to stop polluter-friendly laws. Washington's 8th, 3rd, and 5th districts are key to winning back the House -- voters must turn out. With a slim one-seat majority in the Senate at the state level, addressing climate change could easily slip off Washington's agenda too. Last November, voters like you gave us a Democratic majority in all three branches of our state government, building a big blue wall against the Trump agenda. We were able to lead the nation in passing progressive legislation. But Republicans are fighting to get a majority back and stop our progress. We cannot stop climate change by pretending it doesn't exist. But we can make a difference by electing leaders who understand the risks and will put measures in place to ensure a clean future. If you want to put climate change back on the table, and show the country that Washington can lead, I strongly encourage you to vote at the primary elections today. Remember that your ballot must be postmarked by today (postage is on us!), returned to a designated ballot drop box by 8:00 p.m., or returned in person to your county elections department by 8:00 p.m. tonight. "" Very truly yours, Jay Inslee P.S. Did you know that Washington now pays for the stamp on your ballot? If you're voting by mail this year, don't worry about the postage! Just fill out your ballot and put it in a mailbox.

Break the Majority is not messing around, friend. Since July 13th, our grassroots organizing team has knocked more than 30,000 doors across North Carolina. That's a whole lot of doors -- but with Democratic candidates running in every district across the state, there is so much more work to do.

**We have a real opportunity at breaking the Republican supermajority in November. Our side has all of the momentum right now, but we can't rely on momentum alone.** [**Can I count on you to chip in to help some of our Majority Breakers?**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203b4c/2fde7c66/49131699/156811bc/32607046/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cand2?refcode=20180807_candemail2_RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2+-+Can+I+count+on+you+to+chip+in+to+help+so&utm_campaign=20180807_candemail2_RC&source=20180807_candemail2_RC")

Meet three more of our Majority Breakers:

**Tess Judge, House District 6 -** Currituck, Dare, Hyde, & Pamlico
_Tess Judge is a successful businesswoman whose long career in hospitality management and broad scope of public service and charitable work fuel her passion for serving people and helping them reach their full potential. As a prominent leader in her community she has taken on major leadership roles within her church and diocese. She will use her extensive experience with area businesses, governments, and community organizations to bring economic development and good-paying jobs to Northeastern North Carolina._

**Mack Paul, Senate District 18 -** Wake and Franklin Counties
_A North Carolina native and local community leader, Mack has a strong record of supporting North Carolina Public Schools and creating jobs in our state. In 2011, he chaired the Wake County Democratic Party, leading the charge to elect a majority to the Wake County School Board to ensure every child has access to quality public education. Mack is currently a founding partner at Morningstar Law Group, where he has learned how to run a small business and solve problems through cooperation and compromise._

**Rachel Hunt, House District 103 -** Charlotte
_Rachel Hunt is a small-business owner, lawyer and an education advocate. Rachel is the daughter of former Governor Jim Hunt and inherited his work ethic, compassion and dedication for education policy. Rachel has spent her career working for the children of Mecklenburg County often through volunteer work like the PTA. Rachel founded a education consulting company that helps all children, including those with disabilities, find the right schools for them to excel. Rachel Hunt wants to go to Raleigh to work on increasing teacher pay and reinvesting in our schools._

With each national election, we're seeing districts that are normally considered safe for Republicans being put in play by Democrats.

We have a real opportunity here, friend. We just have to make sure we have enough money to fund our grassroots organizing team.

[**Please chip in today to help us Break the Majority!**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203b4c/2fde7c66/49131699/156811bf/32607046/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cand2?refcode=20180807_candemail2_RC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=3+-+Please+chip+in+today+to+help+us+Break+th&utm_campaign=20180807_candemail2_RC&source=20180807_candemail2_RC")

Thanks for all you continue to do for our state, Roy
